title: Only one with 07_Derivative_Handoff/; richest SQL DDL
public_claim: Only one with 07_Derivative_Handoff/; richest SQL DDL is a source packet for this is the "derivative layer" handoff package — structurally a near-clone of Proper_Handoff_Archive but with one decisive difference: instead of a 99_Preserved_Source_Archives/ vault, it adds a 07_Derivative_Handoff/ folder that carries 9 new synthesis documents written explicitly as an "implementation-oriented bridge".
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
